summary: AdsGupta Charts Tab and Master Analysis Tab - P0 Features Testing COMPLETE. All requested features verified: 1) Charts Tab displays 4 real data visualizations (Top Keywords by Spend, Performance Overview, Wasted Ad Spend, Spend vs Sales), 2) Master Analysis Tab shows AI-powered strategic insights dynamically generated from uploaded data (ACOS analysis, ROAS analysis, Wasted Spend alerts, CTR, CPC metrics), 3) File upload works and redirects to /analysis page, 4) KPI Display shows Health Score (72), Total Sales ($2,355), Total Spend ($622), ACOS (26.41%), ROAS (3.79x).
critical_code_review_comments: Charts Tab correctly falls back to keyword-based charts when ASIN data isn't available (as designed in analysisEngineV2.js)
Master Analysis generates dynamic insights based on ACOS thresholds (>50% critical, >30% warning, <30% healthy)
ROAS insights correctly identify profitable advertising (>3x) vs losing money (<1x)
Wasted spend detection correctly identifies keywords with clicks > threshold AND zero orders
Key Metrics Summary bar provides quick overview at bottom of Charts tab
seed_data_creation: Used /tmp/test_search_term_data.csv with 16 rows of search term data including wasted spend keywords
context_for_next_testing_agent: Charts Tab and Master Analysis Tab P0 features fully implemented and tested. File upload flow: /audit -> file upload -> processing animation -> /analysis with full data display. Charts Tab shows 4 Recharts visualizations with 34 bar elements and interactive tooltips. Master Analysis shows 6 insight types: ACOS analysis, ROAS analysis, Wasted Spend alerts with keyword list, CTR analysis, CPC analysis, and actionable recommendations. The Key Metrics Summary bar at bottom of Charts shows Total Sales, Total Spend, ACOS, ROAS, Total Clicks, CTR.

mocked_integrations.note: No mocked APIs - all analysis is done client-side with real data processing using Papa.parse for CSV parsing and analysisEngineV2.js for calculations

charts_tab.chart_1_top_keywords_by_spend: WORKING - Horizontal bar chart showing keyword spend distribution from uploaded data
charts_tab.chart_2_performance_overview: WORKING - Multi-bar chart showing Sales (green), Spend (red), Units (cyan), Orders (purple), Clicks (amber), Impressions (teal)
charts_tab.chart_3_wasted_ad_spend: WORKING - Red bar chart showing keywords with clicks but zero orders (4 wasted keywords found: cheap headset €22.50, free shipping headphones €19.00, gym headphones cheap €16.00, sports headband €10.00)
charts_tab.chart_4_spend_vs_sales: WORKING - Dual line chart comparing advertising cost to revenue generated over keywords
charts_tab.summary_metrics_bar: WORKING - Bottom bar shows €2,355 Total Sales, €622 Total Spend, 26.4% ACOS, 3.79x ROAS, 1,223 Total Clicks, 1.46% CTR

master_analysis_tab.acos_insight: WORKING - 'Healthy ACOS: 26.4%' - correctly identifies ACOS below 30% threshold as healthy
master_analysis_tab.roas_insight: WORKING - 'Strong ROAS: 3.79x' - correctly identifies ROAS above 3x as profitable
master_analysis_tab.wasted_spend_insight: WORKING - '€67.50 Wasted on Zero-Converting Keywords' with list of 4 wasted keywords
master_analysis_tab.ctr_insight: WORKING - 'Strong CTR: 1.46%' - correctly identifies CTR above 0.5% threshold
master_analysis_tab.cpc_insight: WORKING - 'Average CPC: €0.51' - shows average cost per click
master_analysis_tab.recommendations: WORKING - Shows actionable recommendations with Zap icons (Consider scaling budget, Consider increasing budget, Monitor CPC trends)

data_processing_verification.csv_parsing: Working - Papa.parse correctly parses CSV with 16 rows
data_processing_verification.metric_detection: Working - 10 metrics detected (searchTerm, impressions, clicks, sales, units, spend, orders, campaignName, adGroupName, matchType)
data_processing_verification.wasted_spend_calculation: Working - Correctly identifies 4 keywords with >5 clicks and 0 orders totaling €67.50
data_processing_verification.acos_calculation: Working - Correctly calculates 26.41% ACOS from €622 spend / €2,355 sales
data_processing_verification.roas_calculation: Working - Correctly calculates 3.79x ROAS from €2,355 sales / €622 spend
